name: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
original_name: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
overview: Dave Stotts chronicles the dramatic spread of Christianity from its origins in Israel to nearly every region of the world. He travels the globe to tell the 2,000-year story of how the Gospel of Jesus Christ reached the Ends of the Earth.

trailers.title: TRAILER - Drive Thru History®: "Ends of the Earth"
